name: Peppermint Oil
summary: Decision-ready summary: Peppermint Oil is best framed for IBS abdominal pain; gut spasm; bloating discomfort; safety screen: GERD; hiatal hernia; gallbladder disease; young children.
description: Peppermint oil can relax gastrointestinal smooth muscle and reduce visceral pain signaling, aligning with evidence for IBS symptom reduction and abdominal discomfort.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: Meta-analysis of RCTs found benefit for global IBS symptoms and abdominal pain
claimMap.notes: Meta-analysis of RCTs found benefit for global IBS symptoms and abdominal pain

claimMap.claim: v10.4: Meta-analysis of 12 RCTs found enteric-coated peppermint oil improved IBS global symptoms and abdominal pain.
claimMap.notes: v10.4: Meta-analysis of 12 RCTs found enteric-coated peppermint oil improved IBS global symptoms and abdominal pain.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Enteric-coated peppermint oil products vary; clinical IBS trials generally use enteric-coated capsules taken before meals
enteric-coated delayed-release peppermint oil TID; 8 weeks

sources.title: Meta-analysis of RCTs found benefit for global IBS symptoms and abdominal pain
